<html>

<head>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <style>.cf_challenge_text_small {
    font-size: 11px;
}

body {
    height: 100vh;
    width: 100vw;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    font-family: sans-serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 20px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2px;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
    margin: 0;
    background: #101014;

    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.logo {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    flex-direction: column;
    text-align: center;
    padding-bottom: 25px;
}

section {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    flex-direction: column;
    text-align: center;
}

h1, p {
    font-family: Brutal, sans-serif;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}

h1 {
    line-height: 34px;
    text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: #fff;
    margin: 0 0 20px;
    font-size: 30px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

p {
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 20px;
    letter-spacing: 0.2px;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
}

a {
    color: #61CDFF;
}

a:visited {
    color: white;
}

strong {
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #fff;
}

.cf_challenge_container {
    max-width: 430px;
    min-width: 200px;
    background-color: #202024;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-direction: column;
    font-family: sans-serif;
    line-height: initial;
    overflow: auto;
    border-radius: 16px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
    margin: 25px;
    padding: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0px 32px 16px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.cf_challenge {
    text-align: center;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-direction: column;
    margin: 25px 0;
}

.cf_challenge_container hr {
    border-bottom: 0;
    max-width: 500px;
    opacity: 0.25;
}

.cf_logo {
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 41px;
}
</style>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='zh-CN'>
<head>
<head>
<script>
  // 立即应用主题，避免页面闪烁 (FOUC)
  (function() {
    function getCookieTheme() {
      var match = document.cookie.match(/theme=(light|dark|system)/);
      return match ? match[1] : null;
    }
  
    function getCurrentTheme() {
      var cookieTheme = getCookieTheme();
      var savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme');
  
      // 优先使用 cookie 中的 theme
      if (cookieTheme) {
        // 如果 localStorage 里没有，就补回去
        if (!savedTheme) {
          localStorage.setItem('theme', cookieTheme);
        }
        return cookieTheme;
      }
  
      // 如果 cookie 中没有 theme，则使用 localStorage 中的 theme
      savedTheme = savedTheme && ['light', 'dark', 'system'].includes(savedTheme) ? savedTheme : 'system'; // 默认跟随系统
  
      return savedTheme;
    }
  
    var savedTheme = getCurrentTheme();
  
    // 检测系统是否为暗黑模式
    function isSystemDarkMode() {
      return window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;
    }
  
    if (savedTheme === 'system') {
      // 系统模式：移除覆盖类，让CSS媒体查询自动处理
      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark-mode-override');
      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark-mode');
    } else {
      // 手动模式：添加覆盖类，禁用媒体查询
      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark-mode-override');
  
      if (savedTheme === 'dark') {
        document.documentElement.classList.add('dark-mode');
      } else {

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='zh-CN'>
<head>
<head>
<script>
  // 立即应用主题，避免页面闪烁 (FOUC)
  (function() {
    function getCookieTheme() {
      var match = document.cookie.match(/theme=(light|dark|system)/);
      return match ? match[1] : null;
    }
  
    function getCurrentTheme() {
      var cookieTheme = getCookieTheme();
      var savedTheme = localStorage.getItem('theme');
  
      // 优先使用 cookie 中的 theme
      if (cookieTheme) {
        // 如果 localStorage 里没有，就补回去
        if (!savedTheme) {
          localStorage.setItem('theme', cookieTheme);
        }
        return cookieTheme;
      }
  
      // 如果 cookie 中没有 theme，则使用 localStorage 中的 theme
      savedTheme = savedTheme && ['light', 'dark', 'system'].includes(savedTheme) ? savedTheme : 'system'; // 默认跟随系统
  
      return savedTheme;
    }
  
    var savedTheme = getCurrentTheme();
  
    // 检测系统是否为暗黑模式
    function isSystemDarkMode() {
      return window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches;
    }
  
    if (savedTheme === 'system') {
      // 系统模式：移除覆盖类，让CSS媒体查询自动处理
      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark-mode-override');
      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark-mode');
    } else {
      // 手动模式：添加覆盖类，禁用媒体查询
      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark-mode-override');
  
      if (savedTheme === 'dark') {
        document.documentElement.classList.add('dark-mode');
      } else {
        document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark-mode');
      }
    }
  })();
</script>

They named the library as Aozora Bunko, or \u201cBlue Sky Library\u201d, because they wanted the library to have an unlimited future. The volunteer group led by him now has several hundred editors, and compiles more than 1000 out-of-copyright books a year, now totaling more than 11000 books. Those books are freely available to anybody, and most ebook distributors in Japan, including Amazon Kindle and Apple\u2019s iBook, have ebooks from Aozora Bunko.   --dg-consent-background-border: 0;
  --consent-border-radius: 1.5rem;
  --consent-shadow: 0 11px 21px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.175),
    0 15px 25px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 25px 55px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
  --dg-primary-font: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, system-ui, -apple-system;
  --dg-secondary-font: Inter, Helvetica, Arial, system-ui, -apple-system;
  --dg-body-font-size: 0.875rem;
  --dg-title-font-size-mobile: 0.75rem;
  --dg-body-font-size-mobile: 0.675rem;
  --dg-button-font-size-mobile: 0.75rem;
  --dg-button-padding-mobile: 0.675rem 0.75rem;
  box-shadow: var(--consent-shadow);
  padding: 0.125rem 0 0.5rem;

  .dg-button {
    --dg-button-radius: 10rem;
    --dg-button-font-size: 0.875rem;
    --dg-button-font-weight: 500;
    font-family: var(--dg-secondary-font);
  }

  .dg-option-info {
    --dg-policy-option-heading-size-mobile: 0.8125rem;
  }

  .dg-main-content-policy-option-heading .clickable {
    font-weight: 500;
  }

  .dg-slider:not(.essential-label) {
    height: 1.5rem;
    width: 2.4375rem;
    width: 2.4375rem;
  }

  .dg-slider::after {
    width: 1.125rem;
    height: 1.125rem;
  }

  .dg-header-buttons:has(> .dg-header-close) {
    margin-top: 0.25rem;
    margin-right: 0.25rem;
  }
}

:host(.dg-consent-banner.dg-bottom) .dg-app {
  max-height: 24rem;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 481px) {
  :host(.dg-consent-banner) .dg-app {
    padding: 1.5rem;

    .dg-button:last-child {
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .dg-header-buttons:has(> .dg-header-close) {
      margin-top: 0;
      margin-right: 0;
    }
  }
}

    <title>Захищена сторінка</title>
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width">
	<style>
        body {background: #f2f4f6;padding: 0;margin: 0;font: 17px Tahoma;color: #6d6d6d}
        #container {height: 100vh;width: 100%;}
        #noscript {font-family: sans-serif;text-align: center;}
        #noscript p {font-size: 140%;margin-top: 100px;}

        #error {display: flex;justify-content: center;align-items: center;flex-flow: column;height: 65vh;}
        #error_message{width: 40%;}

        .link {color: #6d6d6d; width: 100%;position: fixed;bottom: 5%;display: flex;justify-content: center; font-size: 15px}
        .link>div{text-align: center;}
        .link a {color: #6d6d6d;text-decoration: none; margin-left: 0.5em}
        .link a:hover {color: #4b4b4b;text-decoration: underline}
        .link-info {font-size: 13px; margin-top: 10px}
        
        .loader {position: absolute;top: 0;left: 0;width: 100%;height: 100%;}
        .loader>div {display: block;position: relative;left: 50%;top: 30%;width: 120px;height: 120px;margin: -60px 0 0 -60px;border-radius: 50%;border: 3px solid transparent;border-top-color: #3498db;-webkit-animation: spin 2s linear infinite;animation: spin 2s linear infinite;}

{"posts":[{"id":6661236,"user_id":212612,"title":null,"content":"

This page covers some key ideas for getting the best out of the place. 

TL;DR: Core Tips

  • There IS an app for Pillowfort, if you want one.
    • It's not on the app stores so PF can continue supporting NSFW creators and keep independence.
  • Use Communities to find people to follow, flesh out your feed, or show your posts to new audiences by resharing into them.
    • This solves the most common problem of Pillowfort seeming 'dead' to newcomers.
  • You can edit posts and control how visible they are + how people can engage with them at any time using post-level settings.
  • The Tassel extension has a collection of tools for adding new features to the site or hiding existing ones you want rid of.
  • Using the NSFW flag combined with an NSFW tag ensures that the only people who CAN see a post are choosing to see NSFW material.

Let's go into more detail and provide resources.

Getting Set Up

You can access a menu of options for using the site on the left hand side of the screen.  [READ-MORE]

You can expand it by hitting the > arrow at the top.

	<script>
(function() {
  var d = document.documentElement;
  d.classList.add('theme-init');

  function getCookie(name) {
    try {
      var m = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(?:^|; )' + name.replace(/[-[\]{}()*+?.,\\^$|#\s]/g, '\\$&') + '=([^;]*)'));
      return m ? decodeURIComponent(m[1]) : null;
    } catch (e) { return null; }
  }

  var saved = null;

  try {
    saved = localStorage.getItem('theme');
  } catch (e) {}

  if (saved !== 'dark' && saved !== 'light') {
    saved = getCookie('theme');
  }

  if (saved === 'dark' || saved === 'light') {
    d.setAttribute('data-theme', saved);
    return;
  }

  d.setAttribute('data-theme', 'light');
  
})();
</script>

Qui suis-je ?<\/h2>

Game designer de profession<\/strong>, j'ai travaill\u00e9 \u00e0\u00a0Arkane Studios<\/strong>\u00a0o\u00f9 encore\u00a0Ubisoft Annecy<\/strong>, sur des titres comme \"Splinter Cell: Double Agent\", \"Dark messiah\" ou \"Dishonored\". Aujourd'hui je travaille en tant que game designer \u00e0 WolfEye avec d'anciens d'Arkane Studios sur le jeu \"WeirdWest\"<\/p>


<\/p>

Depuis tout petit, ce m\u00e9dia me passionne. J'ai rapidement d\u00e9cid\u00e9 d'en faire mon m\u00e9tier

{"thread":{"id":62701,"num_comments":0,"last_comment_at":null,"permalink":"page_1749229","created_at":"2023-11-18T03:35:35+0100"},"aclPage":["ACL_BETA_DONATION_PAGE_V2","ACL_COMMENT","ACL_CUSER_CONNECT","ACL_CUSER_PROFILE","ACL_CUSER_READ","ACL_MERCHANT","ACL_ORDER_CREATE","ACL_ORDER_EVENT","ACL_ORDER_READ","ACL_PAGES_GOAL","ACL_PAGES_LINK","ACL_PAGES_PAGE","ACL_PAGES_REWARD","ACL_PAGES_SHOW_V2","ACL_PAYIN","ACL_PAYIN_RECEIVE","ACL_PAYIN_SEND","ACL_PAYOUT"],"paymentMeans":{"adyen":{"paymentMeans":["CB","SOFORT","GIROPAY","PAYSAFECARD","IDEAL"],"isActivate":false}},"user":{"userLanguage":"fr","id":1749229,"username":"larebouille","pseudo":"LaRebouille","parameters":[]},"slug":"larebouille","tipper_number":0,"styles":{"mainColor":null},"state":"ACTIVATED","links":[{"id":105391,"value":"https:\/\/www.twitch.tv\/larebouille","type":"twitch","main":true},{"id":105393,"value":"https:\/\/www.youtube.com\/@LaRebouille0","type":"youtube","main":false}],"avatar":{"updated_at":"2023-11-18T03:50:02+0100","name":"sans.titre.1.jpg","id":5179309,"original_path":"uploads\/media\/image\/jpeg\/20231118\/202311186558265a4f33d.jpeg"},"cover":null,"content":"

Qui suis-je ?<\/h2>

Bonsoir \u00e0 tous ! Je suis LaRebouille, Streamer Twitch depuis bient\u00f4t 3 ans ! Je me sers de ma cha\u00eene pour offrir aux gens un endroit agr\u00e9able o\u00f9 s'amuser et oublier les petits tracas du quotidien. J'essaie d'offrir un contenu qualitatif, que ce soit par le gameplay (m\u00eame si c'est compliqu\u00e9) que par les animations que je propose. L'humour beauf \u00e9tant la ligne directrice de la cha\u00eene, inculquer le respect tout en \u00e9tant dans cet humour est important pour moi !<\/p>


<\/p>
